label: Simulation, operations research & wargaming

node.label: Simulation, operations research & wargaming
node.definition: Simulation, operations-research, and wargaming systems model actors, resources, uncertainty, logistics, policies, and outcomes to support analysis and training.
node.why_it_matters: This system is an application boundary where technical capability, evidence, safety controls, economics, and user workflow must succeed together.

limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence, Game-playing, control & simulation agents.
